ddls:
CREATE TABLE "court_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "docket_id" INTEGER /* Docket ID assigned to the case */,
  "court_office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the court office handling the case */,
  "initiation_date" TEXT /* Date the case was initiated */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the case was filed */,
  "disposition_date" TEXT /* Date the case was disposed */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Current status of the case */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., civil, criminal) */,
  "complaintant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaintant */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge handling the case */,
  "prosecutor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prosecutor handling the case */,
  "public_defender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public defender handling the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_cases_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_cases_complaintant_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaintant_id") REFERENCES complaintants ("complaintant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_cases_prosecutor_id FOREIGN KEY ("prosecutor_id") REFERENCES lawyers ("lawyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_cases_court_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_office_id") REFERENCES court_offices ("court_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_cases_public_defender_id FOREIGN KEY ("public_defender_id") REFERENCES lawyers ("lawyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_offices" (
  "court_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court office */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the court office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the court office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the court office */,
  "departments" TEXT /* Departments within the court office (e.g., civil, criminal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaintants" (
  "complaintant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaintant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the complaintant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the complaintant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the complaintant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the complaintant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaintant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defendants" (
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defendant */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the defendant is associated with */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the defendant */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the defendant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the defendant */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date the defendant was arrested */,
  "bail_status" TEXT /* Bail status of the defendant (e.g., granted, denied) */,
  "bail_amount" TEXT /* Amount of bail set for the defendant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defendant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defendants_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES court_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lawyers" (
  "lawyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lawyer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lawyer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the lawyer (e.g., prosecutor, public defender) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the lawyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the lawyer */,
  "bar_number" TEXT /* Bar number of the lawyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lawyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the judge (e.g., Judge, Justice) */,
  "court_office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court office the judge is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_dates" (
  "court_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court date */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the court date is associated with */,
  "court_date" TEXT /* Date of the court hearing */,
  "court_type" TEXT /* Type of court hearing (e.g., trial, hearing) */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge presiding over the court date */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the court date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_dates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES court_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_dates_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the charge is associated with */,
  "charge_description" TEXT /* Description of the charge */,
  "statute_description" TEXT /* Statute description for the charge */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the charge (e.g., misdemeanor, felony) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES court_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the disposition is associated with */,
  "disposition_date" TEXT /* Date the case was disposed */,
  "disposition_type" TEXT /* Type of disposition (e.g., guilty, not guilty) */,
  "disposition_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disposition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispositions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES court_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the note is associated with */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES court_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., judge, prosecutor, public defender) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
